subcodes.first_line: O ye two pilgrims of the hallowed and luminous Shrine! With utmost joy and fragrance ye have attained unto the dwelling-place of the Best-Beloved and from the rose-garden [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دو زائر مرقد مقدس منور با نهایت روح و ریحان بمنزلکه جانان رسیدید و از گلشن
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
